sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17148" key="a)to/ceutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτόξ-ευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">out of bow-shot,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέτρα</foreign> Plu<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1458.tlg001:2:326e" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.326e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
